title: Rob&Peace
description: Robbing mob items instead of attacking
body:
[日本語](https://github.com/YukkuriLaboratory/RobAndPeace/blob/main/README.md)

This mod replaces player attacking system to original robbing system, and adds some helper item.

### Items
- Gloves: Increases item drop chance
- MagicHand: Increase player block reach
- PickingTool: Unlock vault
- PortalHoop: Allows to pass through that surface
- Smoke: Blinding hostile mobs
- Spider walker: Allows to climb any walls and roofs

> This mod created for [しう(siu)](https://www.youtube.com/@siu_lab)'s project "Thief Craft"(JP)
> <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WLg57g4m2ew" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Note

Some system refered from [PortalGun](https://github.com/iPortalTeam/PortalGun) and [Better-Mobility](https://github.com/peanutsponge/Better-Mobility).
